ItacAcademyItem.Name: Storditi (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One publication related to the history of the Academy, but not in British Library collections, is Claudio Betti, De l`honore. Consideratione de l`eccell.mo filosofo M. Claudio Betti Modonese (Bologna 1567). According to Giorgio Stabile, it was first recited during one of the Academy meetings.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
